subject: usb: gadget: legacy: fix error return code of multi_bind()
notes: L0 = zero-shot compositional; N_PRED=1; no refine loops. POC + verifier-v1 artifacts reused from C3 err-4-rep1 (POC-side scaffolding not ablated per L0 spec). Only isStatusVar kept as the single predicate; the C3 auxiliary predicates (isNegativeConstant / isFailGoto / missingStatusAssignBeforeGoto / labelReturnsVarWithoutNegativeAssign) are inlined verbatim in the final assembly where-clause. final.ql compiles on first try; fires on multi_bind_buggy (poc.c:34) and handler_buggy_tp1 (poc.c:60); silent on multi_bind_fixed, handler_fixed_tn1, handler_fp_fp1.
